_fixtureMetadata.query: SELECT user_id, channel, channel_user_id, created_at, last_seen_at FROM user_identity.channel_identities LIMIT 3
_fixtureMetadata.description: Fixture data for OTP integration tests. Uses Hoops RFC-002 schema shape. UUIDs are v4 format matching gen_random_uuid() output. Phone numbers are E.164 formatted, unique per scenario.

new_user_web.description: AC-3.1: Brand new phone+channel — web channel first contact

existing_user_whatsapp.description: AC-3.2: Pre-seeded whatsapp identity — verify reuses user_id

cross_channel_web_for_whatsapp_user.description: AC-4.1: Pre-seeded whatsapp identity — verify web channel reuses user_id and adds second channel_identity row

rate_limit_test.description: AC-6.1: Unique phone for rate-limit integration test — avoids contaminating other scenarios
